The script exit code is 1 but it just means "at least one session exceeded thresholds and a summary was created". It ran successfully. The key info:

- `agent:main:telegram:direct:robberzaz` hit 27.4% context → summary created
- All other sessions are below threshold
- No compaction was triggered (no "COMPACT:" lines)

The cron can safely report this as a successful check.
